name: context-studio
description: Context studio (infrastructural): orchestrates the tools/ tier (notion-sources / source-enrich / source-summarise / theme-propose / theme-cluster / theme-entity / youtube-transcript) to populate a per-engagement context store. Other studios reference an engagement's context by slug for mapping (Principal), routing (Producer), reader modelling (audience), and so on. The tools tier stays studio-free (dumb-tool invariant, ADR-004); this studio calls them over the CLI boundary.
